title: Add your featured official match highlights
description: Replace the videoId in highlights.json with a YouTube video ID from an official rights holder.

title: Match highlights slot 2
description: Use official league, club, tournament or broadcaster videos only.

title: Match highlights slot 3
description: Paste only the YouTube video ID, not the full link.

title: Match highlights slot 4
description: This card becomes playable once a valid video ID is added.
